content: I have some life change event and not sure if I'm eligible to change the benefits options
I can help you determine if you're eligible to change your benefits. Could you please tell me what life event occurred and the date it happened?
I adopted a baby on Feb 19, 2026

Congratulations on your adoption! Because you've experienced a birth/adoption, you are eligible to make changes to your benefits. You have 31 days from the date of the event to make these changes.

Would you like to add the baby as a dependent and/or make changes to your benefit elections at this time?

Okay, let's start with adding your adopted baby as a dependent. I'll need some information to get started:
- What is the baby's full name?
- What is the baby's Social Security Number (SSN)?
Thanks! Before I add Sohee Kang as a dependent, can you confirm the relationship? Is Sohee a child or legal ward?

Okay, I'm ready to add Sohee as your child dependent.

I will add Sohee Kang, born on Feb 19, 2026, as a child dependent. You will be required to upload supporting documentation (adoption decree or placement letter) in the next step.

Do you wish to proceed?
